title: Running the Thermo Scientific Arktik Thermal Cycler
author: Dr. Steven Wilhelm
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.in5cdg6
materials: Highlight a folder and press OPEN (F1)
Highlight the protocol and press OPEN again

steps.title: Press NEW from the main screen...
steps.instruction: Press NEW from the main screen This will show a DEFAULT protocol, which is a graphical representation of a typical PCR temperature cycling routine.

steps.title: Toggle between the different steps with the cursor keys
steps.instruction: Toggle between the different steps with the cursor keys

steps.title: Press ADD (F1) to add a...
steps.instruction: Press ADD (F1) to add a temperature step to the left of where you want to add it

steps.title: Press DELETE (F2) to delete a highlighted temperature step
steps.instruction: Press DELETE (F2) to delete a highlighted temperature step

steps.title: To add advanced options (temperature increment,...
steps.instruction: To add advanced options (temperature increment, extend time or slow ramp rate, and temperature gradient) press OPTION (F3) and follow the instructions on the screen. INC (F1) = add or subtract a temperature increment EXT (F2) = add or subtract a time extension RAMP (F3) = slows the ramp rate (input range = 0.1 - 0.4 degrees C/sec. GRAD (F4) = sets a gradient

steps.title: Press BACK (F4) to exit without saving
steps.instruction: Press BACK (F4) to exit without saving

steps.title: Press SAVE (F5) to save the protocol
steps.instruction: Press SAVE (F5) to save the protocol

steps.title: Specify the SAMPLE (F4) or BLOCK...
steps.instruction: Specify the SAMPLE (F4) or BLOCK (F5) mode Sample mode is recommended for most protocols

steps.title: Specify the vessel type by selecting...
steps.instruction: Specify the vessel type by selecting UTW (F4) or COMMON (F5)

steps.title: Press YES (F4) to run the protocol
steps.instruction: Press YES (F4) to run the protocol
